subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope, my Destiny, my Fashioner, my Refuge, and my Sanctuary! Behold, Thy servant 'Azíz hath abased himself before Thy celestial dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و مقدری و مصوری و ملاذی و معاذی ان عبدک عزیز قد تذلل الی جبروت
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
